prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone photo, looks genuinely captured with a mobile phone, not a DSLR or AI render. A cheerful young East Asian woman sitting sideways on a pastel yellow vintage-style scooter parked on a quiet sunlit road. She is smiling brightly at the phone camera while making a peace sign with one hand and resting the other on the handlebar. Wearing a pale yellow fitted crop T-shirt, a white pleated tennis skirt, white ankle socks, white sneakers, a cream-yellow retro open-face helmet with a clear visor, a silver necklace, and a smartwatch. Bright summer daylight, soft natural shadows, clean empty street with trees and sidewalks in the background. Slight handheld framing, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, subtle motion blur, authentic smartphone camera perspective, casual candid vibe, Instagram-style snapshot, high detail, photorealistic, looks like an unedited iPhone/mobile camera photo, no studio lighting, no watermark, no text, no logos.

promptZh: 超写实手机摄影照片，看起来像是用手机真实拍摄的，而非单反相机或 AI 渲染。一位开朗的 年轻东亚女性 侧坐在停在阳光明媚的安静道路上的 淡黄色复古风格踏板摩托车 上。她对着手机镜头灿烂微笑，一只手比出剪刀手，另一只手放在车把上。身穿 淡黄色修身短款 T 恤、白色百褶网球裙、白色短袜、白色运动鞋，佩戴奶油黄色复古半盔（带透明面罩）、银色项链和智能手表。明亮的夏日日光，柔和的自然阴影，背景是干净空旷的街道，带有树木和人行道。轻微的手持构图，自然的手机 HDR，逼真的皮肤纹理，细微的运动模糊，真实的手机摄像头视角，随意的抓拍氛围，Instagram 风格快照，高细节，照片级真实感，看起来像未经编辑的 iPhone/手机拍摄照片，无影棚灯光，无水印，无文字，无 Logo。
